changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Preserve V1 media_file data by renaming it to media_file_old

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: New media_file_version: one row per unique content (filehash + file_type). Populated from media_file_old grouping on content identity.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE media_file_version ( id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, commit VARCHAR(45) NULL DEFAULT NULL, invalid TINYINT UNSIGNED NULL, parent_id INT UNSIGNED NULL, media_file_id INT UNSIGNED NULL, exifbackup BIT(1) NULL ) SELECT filehash, type AS file_type, parent_id, size, standalone, date_stored, date_stored_local, date_stored_utc, date_stored_tz FROM media_file_old GROUP BY filehash, type, size, standalone, date_stored, date_stored_local, date_stored_utc, date_stored_tz;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `media_file_version` ADD UNIQUE INDEX `filehash_unique` (`filehash` ASC, `file_type` ASC) VISIBLE, ADD INDEX `filehash_idx` (`filehash` ASC, `file_type` ASC), ADD INDEX `parent_fk_idx` (`parent_id` ASC);
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE `media_file_version` DROP INDEX `filehash_unique`, DROP INDEX `filehash_idx`, DROP INDEX `parent_fk_idx`;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: New media_file: one row per logical media file identity (original_filename + file_type + standalone combination). Two passes: hashed files (image_id > 3) and non-hashed files.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE media_file ( id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, main_id INT UNSIGNED NULL, image_id INT UNSIGNED NULL COMMENT 'temp for migration', shotnumber INT UNSIGNED NULL ) SELECT mfo.original_filename, mfo.title_in_filename, mfo.type AS file_type, mfo.standalone, mfi.id AS original_version_id FROM media_file_old mfo LEFT JOIN media_file_version mfi ON mfi.filehash = mfo.filehash WHERE mfo.filehash IN ( SELECT mfox.filehash FROM media_file_old mfox WHERE mfox.image_id < 4 GROUP BY mfox.filehash ) GROUP BY mfo.original_filename, mfo.title_in_filename, mfo.type, mfo.standalone, mfi.id;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Populate media_file with entries from media_file_old that have image_id > 3
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO media_file (original_filename, title_in_filename, file_type, standalone, image_id, shotnumber, original_version_id) SELECT mfo.original_filename, mfo.title_in_filename, mfo.type AS file_type, mfo.standalone, mfo.image_id, mfo.shotnumber, NULL FROM media_file_old mfo WHERE mfo.image_id > 3 GROUP BY mfo.image_id, mfo.type, mfo.shotnumber, mfo.original_filename, mfo.title_in_filename, mfo.standalone;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: New media_image: links media_file_version to image, carries per-file image metadata (duration, GPS, orientation, keyword, rating, title).
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE media_image ( id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, invalid TINYINT UNSIGNED NULL ) SELECT mfv.id AS media_file_version_id, mfv.file_type, mfo.image_id, mfo.exifbackup, mfo.duration, mfo.latitude, mfo.longitude, mfo.altitude, mfo.orientation, mfo.keyword, mfo.rating, mfo.title FROM media_file_old mfo LEFT JOIN media_file_version mfv ON mfo.filehash = mfv.filehash AND mfo.type = mfv.file_type GROUP BY mfv.id, mfv.file_type, mfo.image_id, mfo.exifbackup, mfo.duration, mfo.latitude, mfo.longitude, mfo.altitude, mfo.orientation, mfo.keyword, mfo.rating, mfo.title;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: New media_file_instance: one row per physical file location (folder_id + filename), replacing the V1 drive/folder columns on media_file.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE media_file_instance ( id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY ) SELECT id AS media_file_old_id, folder_id, filename, name_version, date_mod, XMPattached FROM media_file_old;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Add audit/tracking columns to the new media_file table
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `media_file` ADD COLUMN `media_directory_id` INT UNSIGNED NULL AFTER `main_id`, ADD COLUMN `credate` DATETIME NULL AFTER `media_directory_id`, ADD COLUMN `creator` VARCHAR(255) NULL AFTER `credate`, ADD COLUMN `upddate` DATETIME NULL AFTER `creator`, ADD COLUMN `updater` VARCHAR(255) NULL AFTER `upddate`;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE `media_file` DROP COLUMN `media_directory_id`, DROP COLUMN `credate`, DROP COLUMN `creator`, DROP COLUMN `upddate`, DROP COLUMN `updater`;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Add audit columns plus media_file_version and media_file FKs to media_file_instance
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `media_file_instance` ADD COLUMN `media_file_version_id` INT UNSIGNED NULL AFTER `XMPattached`, ADD COLUMN `media_file_id` INT UNSIGNED NULL AFTER `media_file_version_id`, ADD COLUMN `file_type` VARCHAR(5) NULL AFTER `media_file_version_id`, ADD COLUMN `credate` DATETIME NULL, ADD COLUMN `creator` VARCHAR(255) NULL, ADD COLUMN `upddate` DATETIME NULL, ADD COLUMN `updater` VARCHAR(255) NULL;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE `media_file_instance` DROP COLUMN `media_file_version_id`, DROP COLUMN `media_file_id`, DROP COLUMN `file_type`, DROP COLUMN `credate`, DROP COLUMN `creator`, DROP COLUMN `upddate`, DROP COLUMN `updater`;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Copy media_file_version_id and file_type into media_file_instance from media_file_version

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `media_file_instance` ADD INDEX `media_file_instance_fk_media_file_idx` (`media_file_id` ASC), ADD CONSTRAINT `media_file_instance_fk_media_file` FOREIGN KEY (`media_file_id`) REFERENCES `media_file` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `media_image` ADD CONSTRAINT `media_image_fk_media_file_version` FOREIGN KEY (`media_file_version_id`) REFERENCES `media_file_version` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Added media_type discriminator column to media_image
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `media_image` ADD COLUMN `media_type` VARCHAR(5) NULL DEFAULT 'MAIN' AFTER `title`;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Propagate date_stored* values to media_file_version rows that share a filehash with rows that do have dates (from different folder/drive locations).
